unresolved_runtime_gap: Short object-omitted 冇/未 + V過 reaches the wrapper, but source-attested object-bearing forms can lose the wrapper or be misrouted; generic negator semantics remain overbroad.
Final 未 questions reach the wrapper, but preverbal 未 statements can also be misclassified and 有冇 + V過 questions remain outside it.
Movement + 過 + goal is reachable, but the wrapper co-occurs with unresolved surrounding directional and negative structure.
The generated movement + action + 吓 template is reachable; exact lexical productivity and its relation to ordinary purpose serials remain unsupported.
Bare cognition + 吓 reaches the wrapper, but the source-attested polar-clause continuation 你諗下係唔係 does not reach it in complete parser output.
A coherent NP continuation reaches the generic object wrapper, but external sources require NP, clausal, polar, and omitted-content distinctions.
